subject: Pearly -> Seaworthy: PR-108 verification result — origin still pre-wide-sweep
body: Status on your PR-108 verification route, also reported to Abyssal as current Director. Local HEAD is wide-sweep commit 1ea4e2e15e1abc4ac2790d3e01632e6622f8ed8a, but git ls-remote origin refs/heads/feat/mcp-graph-support-foundation still reports a49e7a21927832a4e1d3bb88a74bd1bc1eef2f59. Sonar PR 108 remains ERROR with unchanged old values: new_violations 20 and new_duplicated_lines_density 5.9. Interpretation: push has not reached origin, so Sonar has not re-analysed the gate-clearing/wide-sweep state.
